allow: Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36" "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Supply_and_demand" | head -500)

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36" "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Supply_and_demand" | grep -A 5000 '<div class="mw-parser-output">' | head -6000 | sed 's/<[^>]*>//g' | tr -s '\\n' '\\n' | sed 's/\\[edit\\]//g' | head -2000)
Bash(grep -A 5000 'mw-parser-output' /tmp/wikipedia.html | head -6000 | sed 's/<[^>]*>//g' | tr -s '\\n' '\\n' | sed 's/\\[edit\\]//g' | sed 's/  / /g' | grep -v '^\\s*$' | head -300)

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8c/Supply-demand-equilibrium.svg/1200px-Supply-demand-equilibrium.svg.png" -o "outputs/screenshots/supply-demand-equilibrium.png" 2>/dev/null && echo "Downloaded supply-demand diagram")

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8c/Supply-demand-equilibrium.svg/1200px-Supply-demand-equilibrium.svg.png" -o "outputs/screenshots/supply_demand_equilibrium.png" 2>/dev/null && ls -la outputs/screenshots/)
